channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. Hezbollah Ramping Up FPV Drone Attacks On IDF In Lebanon  The War Zone
  4. Countering the fallacy of the buffer zone  Bangkok Post
  5. Inviolable borders?  Columbus Jewish News

item.title: 2,080 Tomahawk Missiles Vanished Overnight, and the Navy Is Now Desperate to Save Its Ohio-Class Submarines - The Daily Galaxy
item.description: 2,080 Tomahawk Missiles Vanished Overnight, and the Navy Is Now Desperate to Save Its Ohio-Class Submarines  The Daily Galaxy

item.title: Netanyahu-Trump Divisions on Iran War Threaten to Box In US - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Netanyahu-Trump Divisions on Iran War Threaten to Box In US  Bloomberg.com
  2. Israel and the Cease-Fire  The American Prospect
  3. Ceasefire ends fighting, but unresolved issues linger in US-Iran deal  The Jerusalem Post

  5. 5 lessons Israel learned from Iran – at a cost of 50–100 billion shekels  Haaretz
